domain: metalworking inspection gauges, welding fixtures, fabrication layout tools, and deburring shop aids

ideas.product_context: A handheld inspection gauge used by welders and quality technicians to compare fillet weld shape, throat feel, toe blend, and convexity across varied joint styles without needing a dedicated gauge for each weld family.
ideas.core_function: Presents multiple sliding and pivoting reference faces that can be brought against a weld bead to visually and tactilely compare profile regularity.
ideas.likely_main_part: A flat gauge body with pivoting profile leaves, sliding reference noses, and finger grip cutouts.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires representing nested moving gauge leaves, curved comparison edges, thin reference surfaces, and readable shop-floor affordances without relying on exact numeric sizing.

ideas.idea_title: Magnetic Tack Weld Corner Holding Fixture
ideas.product_context: A compact fabrication bench fixture for holding two metal workpieces in a repeatable corner relationship while tack welds are placed before final welding.
ideas.core_function: Uses magnetic contact pads and relieved welding access windows to hold parts while leaving torch clearance around the corner.
ideas.likely_main_part: A triangular fixture frame with embedded magnet pockets, heat relief slots, and open torch access cutouts.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges CAD generation with mixed solid and void regions, magnet insert recesses, weld-access geometry, and functional symmetry that must be visually legible.

ideas.idea_title: Sheet Metal Edge Burr Detection Comb
ideas.product_context: A deburring station aid used after shearing, punching, or laser cutting to quickly detect sharp raised burrs along sheet edges before parts move downstream.
ideas.core_function: Draws a row of flexible feeler teeth along an edge so snagging or deflection reveals burr presence and direction.
ideas.likely_main_part: A handle-backed comb with graduated flexible tines, a protective nose, and replaceable wear strip features.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests the ability to model many thin repeated compliant features, a comfortable handle, protective guards, and a serviceable insert concept.

ideas.product_context: A fabrication layout tool for marking saddle cuts and intersection curves on pipe before cutting or fit-up in welded pipe assemblies.
ideas.core_function: Wraps around round stock and exposes traceable curve slots for common branch intersection layouts while maintaining alignment around the circumference.
ideas.likely_main_part: A flexible wrap band with curved stencil slots, alignment tabs, indexing marks, and locking overlap features.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires capturing a flexible band concept, curved layout apertures, repeatable registration features, and a part whose function depends on wrapping around cylindrical work.

ideas.product_context: A simple inspection and setup tool used during welded plate assembly to check whether root openings, lap gaps, or spacer clearances are consistent before tacking.
ideas.core_function: Offers a fan of stepped tabs that can be inserted between plates to compare gap ranges and highlight uneven fit-up.
ideas.likely_main_part: A pivoted stack of flat gauge tabs mounted to a thumb plate with a stop arc and retaining fastener boss.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Exercises representation of stacked thin components, stepped feeler geometry, pivot hardware, stop limits, and inspection-oriented human interaction.

ideas.product_context: A bench-mounted shop aid that helps operators hold small parts at consistent presentation angles against a deburring wheel or abrasive belt.
ideas.core_function: Provides adjustable angled support faces and sacrificial edge rails that guide parts while keeping hands away from the abrasive contact zone.
ideas.likely_main_part: A slotted base with tilting rest plate, replaceable edge rails, clamp knobs, and chip clearance pockets.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests assemblies with adjustable planes, slotted travel, replaceable wear elements, guarded operator zones, and debris-management cutouts.

ideas.product_context: A quality-control fixture used to position small welded test coupons consistently before bending, marking, or visual inspection.
ideas.core_function: Cradles coupons against stops and centering ribs so the weld zone aligns to a reference window or press contact region.
ideas.likely_main_part: A compact locator block with coupon channels, raised centering ribs, open inspection window, and stop shoulders.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires clear depiction of datum surfaces, channels, visual inspection access, raised ribs, and asymmetrical features tied to workpiece orientation.

ideas.product_context: A fabrication layout hand tool for marking parallel offset lines along plate edges, flanges, or cut profiles when preparing weld seams and bend lines.
ideas.core_function: Bridges over an edge while guiding a scribe point at a selectable offset from the workpiece boundary.
ideas.likely_main_part: A U-shaped sliding bridge with edge follower feet, locking offset carriage, and protected scribe holder.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges CAD with bridging geometry, sliding offset mechanisms, small tool-holding details, and surfaces that reference an external workpiece edge.

ideas.product_context: A welding and cutting setup aid used to verify consistent torch nozzle standoff from a work surface before starting a pass or cut.
ideas.core_function: Clips around a nozzle or rests against it and presents reference fingers that indicate whether the torch is held at the intended clearance and angle.
ideas.likely_main_part: A split ring body with spring latch detail, radial reference fingers, and heat-relief openings.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests circular clamp forms, split-body retention, radial protrusions, heat-aware voids, and functional interaction with a cylindrical tool.

ideas.product_context: An inspection gauge for checking whether welded tabs, small flanges, or brackets stand square to a base plate during fabrication.
ideas.core_function: Seats on the base plate and frames the upright part with contrasting side references so light gaps reveal angular error.
ideas.likely_main_part: An L-shaped gauge frame with relieved inside corner, sight windows, reference rails, and knurled grip pads.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires modeling precision reference faces, relief clearances, viewing apertures, grip texture cues, and inspection logic based on light-gap visibility.
